content:
The topic is: Books

Here are 3 short answer/essay questions about Books:

1. Explain the role of books in preserving cultural heritage and knowledge across generations. Provide examples to support your explanation. (5 marks)
2. Compare and contrast the experience of reading a physical book versus an e-book. Discuss at least three key differences in terms of accessibility, engagement, and environmental impact. (10 marks)
3. Analyze how the invention of the printing press revolutionized the spread of information and its impact on society. Support your analysis with specific historical examples. (10 marks)

These questions vary in difficulty and marks allocation (one 5-mark question and two 10-mark questions).
